description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the dettmering/hugo-build Docker image. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a pages job that runs the command hugo, publishes the generated public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch; and a test job that also runs hugo but is executed on all branches except master. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed, and the pages job deploys to GitLab Pages.
